title: HeadsAnywhere
description: Use players' heads anywhere you want!
body:
# HeadsAnywhere
Are you tired of the fact that when you turn off the `online-mode`, the players' heads disappear in the tab? Or maybe you want to use players' heads in holograms, chat, menus or somewhere else? Then HeadsAnywhere is exactly what you need! This plugin allows you to use players' heads in __all__ plugins compatible with PlaceholderAPI!

# Dependencies
* __PlaceholderAPI__ - it makes __no sense__ to install HeadsAnywhere without it.
* __SkinsRestorer__ - the plugin is __not necessary__ to be installed. If it is installed, then when the skin is changed, the head will be automatically updated.

# Placeholders
* %headsanywhere_head% 
* %headsanywhere_head_<name>%

# Images
![tab](https://i.imgur.com/3ziMxrx.png)
![chat](https://i.imgur.com/lnAGZ2Q.png)
![hologram](https://i.imgur.com/6roL3jP.png)
